CAELYS YOUTH SUMMIT 2027

Diplomacy. Discourse. Decision.

"CAELYS is not just another youth event. It is the platform for people who love learning, love creating, and love contributing to the world."

WHAT IS
CAELYS?

CAELYS is Jodhpur's premier youth leadership summit, bringing together the most curious, driven, and passionate young minds from across India. It is not a competition — it is a conversation. A space where your ideas are taken seriously.

Across three powerful verticals — Model United Nations, Debate & Rhetoric, and the Climate Conclave — delegates engage with the world's hardest questions and emerge transformed.

Learn More

OUR THREE VERTICALS

Model United Nations

Step into the chambers of global diplomacy. Represent nations, negotiate resolutions, and tackle the world's most pressing issues across four meticulously crafted committees.

Learn More

Debate & Rhetoric

Sharpen your arguments, challenge assumptions, and master the art of persuasion. Our AP-format tournament runs across two days of intense, structured debate.

Learn More

Climate Conclave

Science meets policy. Working groups tackle real-world climate challenges, producing tangible outcomes that go beyond discussion into actionable blueprints.

Learn More

500+

DELEGATES

MEMBERS

OUR COMMITMENTS

To Participants

A transformative experience that challenges your mind, expands your worldview, and connects you with peers who share your ambition.

To Team Members

A healthy, supportive environment where growth is celebrated, leadership is earned, and every role matters.

To the World

A youth-led platform that takes ideas seriously — and turns them into something real.

VOICES FROM
PAST EDITIONS

"CAELYS changed the way I think about diplomacy. The committees were challenging, the people were inspiring, and the experience was unforgettable."

— ARJUN M., Delegate, CAELYS 2026

"The Climate Conclave wasn't just talk — we actually built something real. I've never felt more empowered as a young person."

— PRIYA S., Climate Conclave Lead, CAELYS 2026

"The debate tournament at CAELYS is the most well-organized I've attended in India. The adjudication quality and the sportsmanship set it apart from everything else."

— KABIR R., Best Speaker, CAELYS Debate 2026
